scripts.copyAssets: cp -r src/frontend/static/* dist/public/ && cp -r src/frontend/webkit/tokens.css dist/public/styles/tokens.css
scripts.build:frontend: bun run clear && bun run copyAssets && bun build src/frontend/rorschach.ts src/plugins/*/ui/index.ts --outdir dist/public --root src --target browser --format esm --splitting --sourcemap=external --entry-naming '[dir]/[name].js' --minify
scripts.build: bun run build:frontend && bun run build:backend
scripts.dev:frontend: bun run clear && bun run copyAssets && bun build src/frontend/rorschach.ts src/plugins/*/ui/index.ts --outdir dist/public --root src --target browser --format esm --splitting --sourcemap=external --entry-naming '[dir]/[name].js' --watch
scripts.dev: bun run dev:frontend & bun run dev:backend
scripts.rorschach: bun run build && bun run dist/index.js
